The '''''Pulsar''''' was a [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 gunship]] that was a part of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] attached to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander's]] fleet towards the end of [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].

The ''Pulsar'' was commanded by an [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] called [[Kartha]] during the [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. The gunship, however, was heavily damaged and was scuttled following the battle.

{{Ship-stub}}
